test_cases.description: Criminal justice podcast Instagram hashtag strategy

input.account: Documentary podcast — wrongful convictions, prison conditions, police accountability

test_cases.notes: Three-tier logic explained clearly. Existing tag problem identified honestly (all broad tier). Tag bank specific to criminal justice subject, not generic. Campaign hashtag ownable. Usage rules include ghost-tag warning.

test_cases.description: Food culture magazine TikTok hashtag strategy

input.account: Food culture magazine — independent restaurants, food history, chefs

test_cases.notes: TikTok strategy correctly notes that hashtags are secondary to sound and interest signals. Tag bank differentiates food culture from mainstream food content. Limitation about TikTok's interest-based algorithm acknowledged.

test_cases.description: Documentary filmmaker LinkedIn professional hashtag strategy

input.account: Documentary filmmaker — social documentaries, festival circuit
input.goal: Connect with producers, broadcasters, festival programmers

test_cases.notes: LinkedIn hashtag mechanics correctly noted as different from Instagram. Professional-register tags selected. 3-5 tag limit for LinkedIn noted. Industry-specific tags (festival circuit, commissioning) included.
